name: TrailBlazer Hiking Boots
description: Waterproof leather hiking boots with Vibram outsole. Ankle support and cushioned midsole for all-day comfort on rugged trails.

name: Summit Approach Shoes
description: Lightweight approach shoes with sticky rubber sole. Ideal for scrambling and technical approaches.

name: Alpine Summit Jacket
description: 3-layer waterproof breathable jacket with fully sealed seams. Adjustable hood, pit zips, and internal chest pocket.

name: Waterproof Rain Shell
description: Lightweight packable rain jacket. 2.5-layer construction with adjustable hood and elastic cuffs.

name: Basecamp 4P Tent
description: 4-person 3-season tent with full rainfly and two vestibules. Freestanding design with aluminum poles. 5-minute setup.

name: Ridgeline 65L Backpack
description: 65-liter backpacking pack with adjustable torso length and ventilated back panel. Includes rain cover.

name: Ultralight 2P Tent
description: 2-person ultralight tent weighing just 1.2kg. Silnylon fly with single pole design. Best for thru-hikers and minimalist campers.

name: Summit Daypack 30L
description: Versatile 30-liter daypack with hydration sleeve and trekking pole attachments. Breathable mesh back panel.

name: Camp Lantern LED
description: Rechargeable LED lantern with 3 brightness settings. 300 lumens, 40-hour battery life. Collapsible and waterproof.

name: Trail Kitchen Stove Set
description: Compact backpacking stove with integrated pot system. Boils 1L in 3 minutes. Includes pot, lid, and insulated cozy.

name: Hydration Bladder 3L
description: 3-liter hydration reservoir with quick-disconnect hose and wide mouth opening for easy filling and cleaning.

name: Merino Wool Base Layer Top
description: Lightweight merino wool long-sleeve top. Temperature regulating and odor resistant. UPF 30 sun protection.

name: Merino Wool Base Layer Bottom
description: Lightweight merino wool leggings. Flatlock seams prevent chafing. Ideal for hiking, skiing, and cold weather activities.

name: Trekking Poles (Pair)
description: Adjustable aluminum trekking poles with cork grips and carbide tips. Collapses to 65cm for packing.

name: Quick-Dry Hiking Shorts
description: Lightweight nylon hiking shorts with UPF 50 protection. Zippered pockets and gusseted crotch for mobility.
